title: Delicate Flaky Tunisian Pastry Bao
description: A kid-friendly Tunisian dish featuring vanilla extract and bhuna, this pastry bao is winey, flaky, and vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sifted flour, sugar, salt, and yeast.
Add the bhuna spice mix and mix well.
Gradually add the warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle and brush with vegetable oil.
Place a teaspoon of vanilla extract in the center of each circle and fold the dough over to form a bao.
Bake the bao for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
